textByHash.1b60b33b887627c2fb8db1be0d6009fe7c25f8cf: I's been making da machetes for Gabooty's shop Bwana!
textByHash.79732d36ea4154e609aceaa6a42452694802f83e: If you want me to make you a machete we can do a deal if you like.
textByHash.a5aaa58164d7e0467de3bbb5111da368261602b9: Ok Bwana, here's the deal. There are three gem bladed machete types, in order of quality and hacking proficiency, they're ordered from low to high as follows.
textByHash.fe6f4e666a27ed7bf4394d9f2531a841078768c5: Ok Bwana, if you want to order the opal machete, I need 3 opals, either cut or uncut, 1 gout plant tuber and 300 trading sticks please.
textByHash.1554936283574c244837035d8d749af260c831af: Ok Bwana, come back when you have them.
textByHash.94d1b4094a5ddbe572810a4d50bf9da249c21146: Ok Bwana, if you want to order the Jade machete, I need 3 jades, either cut or uncut, 1 gout plant tuber and 600 trading sticks please.
textByHash.4afd295ea7b012025e1cd1bd9f8806aaa3acc476: Ok Bwana, if you want to order the Red Topaz machete, I need 3 Red Topaz, either cut or uncut, 1 gout plant tuber and 1200 trading sticks please.
textByHash.1dda91f3087eb04a55c8c8e862e1c3bb995508a9: There you go Bwana, a nice new Red Topaz machete for you.
textByHash.23ab4ce893970c2bbf29ad7a56cb6eddb5b129fd: So Bwana, do you like the look of the machetes?
textByHash.f4946d4e848d137deb99e61e43d6c332dcd5aa16: They're tougher than just metal on its own, plus it's the only such resource naturally available in this region.
textByHash.08f18704b37d38554c7d1bb0824197f683f5d8a4: It's one of the harder to find resources which I mix with other ingredients in order to bind the ground down gem dust to the surface of the metal bladed machete.
textByHash.e25679d73f2c6be475eda1e6755456f885fd3da5: You can sometimes, if you're lucky, find the plant if you hack away at the jungle around here. You'll need to find a way to dig up the tubers though, they're the important part of the plant.
textByHash.c9470181b9a627c3a886b6c6414da691dd1a9a5c: Expensive bwana, it's quite reasonably priced if you ask me. I can make it cheaper than Gabooty charges for it, that's for sure. And after all, I have to earn a living around here as well you know, I have children to feed!
textByHash.dfc5f8174638da087b660127a73d91ae5a58dd41: Not that I'm aware of, just sit back and enjoy the sunshine bwana!
textByHash.173e70b3902d21891fe9891a993b6ea846c050d9: Bwana, if anyone else asks me that question today, I'll explode! Go and ask someone else!
textByHash.e72a1f6c928e838d992ec85e0180fb7f7144e537: It's just village life as normal around here Bwana, always something interesting to find to occupy your time if you look hard enough.
textByHash.33f92233a6d7ddb6ff0b03d9edb1c6a96dfbbee0: Sorry Bwana, I'm already busy, why not go and talk to Murcaily! He's around the village somewhere.
textByHash.5d96f9a2465c5cc64bea4eda05d7de0b7aa55e0d: Well, I think that there's some work to be done...perhaps Murcaily can help you. He usually tends to the hardwood grove to the east of Trufitus's hut.
textByHash.b83d3464c69329161796f8656b2d211eb243f377: I've already given you some trading sticks and I don't have any more on me at the moment. Why not go and talk to some of the other villagers and get some contributions?
textByHash.5a325a16fb45cd32a622307ce68e177cd3e3b0e6: Ahhhhhhhh - Get away from me you beast!
textByHash.11e2876e9377ff11371b847dbb06d46c68585c41: Waahhhhh! - It's da evil broodoo beast come ta eat my very soul!
